title: Riso Pop
description: Ce style mélange l'illustration classique de la 'ligne claire' avec l'esthétique moderne des fanzines indépendants, se caractérisant par des contours noirs uniformes et des blocs de couleurs vives sans ombrage. L'absence totale de dégradés, de reflets ou d'ombres portées aplatit la composition, tandis qu'une couche épaisse et uniforme de bruit numérique ou de grain façon risographie ajoute une texture tactile et vintage à cette œuvre aux allures vectorielles.
description_en: This style blends classic 'ligne claire' (clear line) illustration with modern indie zine aesthetics, characterized by uniform, unvarying black outlines and solid, unshaded blocks of vibrant color. The complete absence of gradients, highlights, or cast shadows flattens the composition, while a heavy, uniform layer of digital noise or risograph-style grain adds tactile, vintage texture to the otherwise pristine vector-like artwork.
description_fr: Ce style mélange l'illustration classique de la 'ligne claire' avec l'esthétique moderne des fanzines indépendants, se caractérisant par des contours noirs uniformes et des blocs de couleurs vives sans ombrage. L'absence totale de dégradés, de reflets ou d'ombres portées aplatit la composition, tandis qu'une couche épaisse et uniforme de bruit numérique ou de grain façon risographie ajoute une texture tactile et vintage à cette œuvre aux allures vectorielles.
prompt: Digital ink and flat color illustration, ligne claire comic style meets retro indie pop-art zine aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork relies entirely on uniform, unvarying thin black monoline contours to define all forms, featuring a very subtle organic hand-drawn quality rather than rigid geometric vectors. Fill these outlines with solid, unshaded blocks of highly saturated {{primary_color}}, vibrant {{accent_color}}, and punchy {{secondary_color}}. There must be an absolute absence of gradients, highlights, ambient occlusion, or cast shadows; the lighting is perfectly flat, providing ambient shadowless illumination across the entire composition. Spatial depth is achieved solely through the 2D overlapping of crisp, hard-edged elements bounded by their distinct black ink lines, avoiding traditional linear perspective. The most defining textural feature is a heavy, uniform layer of digital noise, film grain, or risograph-style stippling applied globally over the entire image, giving the pristine flat colors a tactile, vintage printed paper feel. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. , ligne claire, retro pop art, risograph grain, flat colors, unshaded, thin black outlines, indie zine illustration, shadowless, uniform digital noise, 2D flat composition, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A purely atmospheric background environment in a retro indie pop-art zine aesthetic and ligne claire style. The scene features flat, sweeping planes of solid, unshaded {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, defined by uniform, thin black monoline contours. Abstract geometric shapes and stylized landscape elements overlap in a 2D flat composition without traditional linear perspective or cast shadows. A heavy, uniform layer of risograph-style film grain and digital noise covers the entire space, adding a tactile, vintage printed paper texture to the vibrant {{accent_color}} details under flat, shadowless ambient illumination.
background_prompt_removebg: A purely atmospheric background environment in a retro indie pop-art zine aesthetic and ligne claire style.
